FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Textile Blight
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: A parasitic infestation has been discovered in your textile stores. The organisms feed on organic fibers, reducing fabric to brittle threads within days. Your apparel production is under direct threat as raw materials crumble and finished goods deteriorate. How do you respond?

FactionColonies.FCOptionDef.label: Burn the contaminated stores. Better to lose stock than let the infestation spread.
Import clean materials from outside traders. Keep production running.
Research resistant fiber treatments. Turn this crisis into an innovation.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Stocks Burned
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Mountains of contaminated fabric go up in flames. The infestation is eradicated, but so is a season's worth of textiles. Apparel production takes a severe hit while new raw materials are sourced and processed.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Materials Imported
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Clean raw materials arrive from outside traders, allowing production to continue at reduced capacity. The imported stock is expensive but free of contamination.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Resistant Fibers Developed
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Your researchers develop a chemical treatment that renders fabrics immune to the parasite. The process is slow to implement, and production suffers during the transition, but the long-term benefits are clear.
